ATTY. RONALD YANK OF CARROLL, BURDICK & MCDONOUGH, TEL. NO. 989-5900 FOR THE PETITIONER;

RULING - A R G U E D. PETITIONER CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATIO Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Compendium Of Federal Authorities- EACH SIDE TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER FOR COURT'S CONSIDERATION BY FEBRUARY 3, 2006. COURT CONTINUED MATTER TO FEBRUARY 3, 2006, NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. (301/JLW/DS) JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: PATRICK J. HEARD, CSR# 11055

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ronald Yank, Esq. of Carroll, Burdick & McDonough, 415-989-5900 for petitioner and moving party CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATION.
Paul Starkey, Esq., of Dept. of Personnel Admin., State of Calif., 916-324-0512 for respondent and opposing party State of Calif.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PETITIONER CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2) IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 1281.3.
Prevailing party to submit form of order. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620. (301/ROBER/DS)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2)
Off Calendar Oct-05-2005 Continued To Nov-21-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

PETITIONER CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration (Ccp 1281.2) IS CONTINUED TO 11/21/05 PER EX PARTE ORDER 9/29/05. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
